title: Fix archived ticket resolution in resolveTicket()
description: Walk through the changes to resolveTicket() that enable resolving archived ticket references, with cross-set numeric ambiguity detection and comprehensive tests.

steps.title: Optional fetchFn parameter for DI testability
steps.description: Added an optional third parameter `options?: { fetchFn?: typeof hxFetch }` to the resolveTicket() signature. Defaults to the real hxFetch when not provided, so all 9 existing callers continue to work with 2 args. Tests inject a mock via this parameter.

steps.title: Active match with exact ID/short ID early return
steps.description: After fetching active tickets, matchTicket is called. If the match is by exact internal ID or exact short ID (case-insensitive), we return immediately without fetching archived. This preserves the active-first priority for unambiguous matches and avoids the extra API call in the common case.

steps.title: Archived ticket fetch fallback
steps.description: When no exact active match exists (or the active match was numeric), fetch archived tickets via `queryParams: { archived: 'true' }`. On fetch failure, throw a distinct 'Failed to fetch archived ticket list for resolution' error rather than falling through to 'not found'.

steps.title: Archived exact ID/short ID matching
steps.description: If there was no active match at all, try matchTicket against archived items. Return immediately for exact ID/short ID matches. Numeric matches from archived fall through to the combined check below.

steps.title: Combined numeric ambiguity check across both sets
steps.description: For numeric refs, scan the combined active + archived array for all shortId suffix matches. If exactly 1 match: return it. If 2+: throw the existing ambiguity error with all matches listed. This catches cross-set ambiguity (e.g., BLD-42 active + ARC-42 archived for ref '42').

steps.title: New resolveTicket test suite
steps.description: Added 9 test cases using node:test mock.fn() injected via the fetchFn DI parameter. The mock inspects queryParams.archived to distinguish active vs archived API calls and return appropriate test data.

steps.title: Cross-set numeric ambiguity test (AC #9)
steps.description: Key regression test: active has BLD-42, archived has ARC-42. Numeric ref '42' should be detected as ambiguous across both sets, not silently resolved to the active match.
